info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: Ryantasya grahaRe grahergfhayate tatrAtadantAd gfheH BUvAdeH Sapi garhate Sni tu pade gfhRAtyagfhRIta ca  garhervA Rici nindanArTavizaye garhettaTA garhayed  BUvAdeH Sapi kutsanArTavizaye garherBavedgarhate ' (Slo. 194) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kfpaRaM cAsTiraM bAlye vfdDaBAve'vagarhitam' (rA0 22119) avagarhitaM balavanninditam ihAvaSabdo garhAyAH pUrRatAmAha uttarapadArTaH pUrvapadArTamasAkalyamanavakASayati
'SrAdDAya nigarhate' (kriyAgrahaRamapi kartavyam ityatra BAzyasTamudAharaRam) SrAdDaM kutsayatItyarTaH
'avftyA vilaSyamAnopi vfttpupAyAnnigarhayan' (BA0 anu0 12413) vigarhayanniti pAWAntaram arTe'viSezaH
'kiM cAnyanmayi durvfttaM yena mAM parigarhase' (BA0 u0 4930) parigarhase BfSaM kutsayasi balavannindasi avagAyasitarAm
